description: Declarative SGF property handling policies for the pipeline. Controls what happens to each SGF property as it flows through ingest → analyze → publish stages.

changelog.author: config-standardization
changelog.changes: Added $schema reference and bumped version. No policy changes.

changelog.author: initial
changelog.changes: Initial SGF property policies for pipeline stages (blocked, preserve, hardcode, override, enrich_if_absent, enrich_if_partial, remove, configurable).

policy_definitions.blocked: Property is dropped at parse time. Never enters the pipeline.
policy_definitions.preserve: Source value passed through unchanged. Pipeline never modifies it.
policy_definitions.hardcode: Always set to a fixed value regardless of source. Requires 'value' field.
policy_definitions.override: Always overwritten by pipeline computation. Source value discarded.
policy_definitions.enrich_if_absent: Computed only when source provides no value. Source value wins if present.
policy_definitions.enrich_if_partial: Source preserved if complete/valid. If malformed/partial, recomputed. Requires 'validator' field.
policy_definitions.configurable: Behavior controlled by a runtime flag. Requires 'flag' and 'default' fields.

DT.description: Date — provenance tracked in publish log

SZ.description: Board size — defaults to 19 if absent

SO.description: Source — provenance tracked in pipeline state

C.description: Root comment — cleaned and preserved by default

YV.description: Schema version — always set to current

YM.description: Pipeline metadata — set at ingest, updated at analyze/publish. Sub-fields: t(trace_id), f(filename), i(run_id), ct(content_type 1-3), tc(trivial_capture)

YG.description: Difficulty level — preserve source if valid

YT.description: Tags — preserve source tags if present

YH.description: Hints — preserve source hints if present

YQ.description: Quality metrics — preserve if complete, recompute if partial

YX.description: Complexity metrics — preserve if complete, recompute if partial
